ready.description: Review the structured training report for this finished interview session.

pending.description: The session finished successfully, but the AI report is still being generated.
pending.title: Report in progress
pending.subtitle: Reports are generated asynchronously after the session ends.
pending.body: This usually finishes within about a minute. You can stay on this page while the report loads.
pending.polling: Checking for the report automatically every 10 seconds.

error.title: Report unavailable
error.description: The session exists, but the report could not be loaded right now.
error.body: Try fetching the report again in a moment.

notFound.description: This session could not be loaded.

overview.noSummary: Detailed feedback was not available for this report.

sections.dimensionsDescription: Each dimension is scored from the actual session evidence.
sections.detailedFeedbackDescription: Long-form report generated from the session timeline, code activity, and peer context.
sections.noDetailedFeedback: No detailed feedback was returned for this report.
sections.testCaseBreakdownDescription: Per-test-case outcome summary with sensitive inputs and expected outputs redacted.
sections.snapshotHistoryDescription: Saved code states captured during the session in chronological order.
sections.finalCodeDescription: The most recent saved code state from the session editor.
sections.noFinalCode: No final code snapshot was available for this session.
sections.aiReviewDescription: Structured feedback generated from the final code, execution history, and session evidence.
sections.timelineDescription: Important coding milestones from the session, excluding periodic autosaves.

details.heading: Session Details
details.description: Participants, metadata, and activity from this finished session.

form.title: Peer Evaluation
form.description: Score your partner's interview performance and leave actionable written feedback.

hint.candidate: Choose the participant this evaluation is for.
hint.strengths: Call out concrete behaviors, explanations, or implementation choices that helped.
hint.improvements: Share specific next steps for the next interview practice.

placeholder.strengths: They clarified assumptions before coding and explained tradeoffs clearly.
placeholder.improvements: They could narrate edge cases earlier and keep variable names more consistent.

ratingHint.debugging: Ability to inspect failures and adapt quickly.
ratingHint.overall: Your holistic evaluation of the session.

validation.candidateRequired: Choose who this feedback is for.
